# adsense-check-api

Cloudflare Worker API for Google AdSense page analysis.

## Authentication

All endpoints require Bearer token in Authorization header.

Free key: `adsense-check-api-key-free`

## Endpoints

### POST /api/analyze/page
5-dimension page scoring (value, originality, relevance, compliance, translation)
Required fields: url, content
Optional fields: lang, pageLanguage, embedSignal (game|tool|video|none), siteTopic, listingSignals, model, modelApiBase, modelApiKey

Example:
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/article",
  "content": "Full page text...",
  "lang": "en",
  "pageLanguage": "English",
  "embedSignal": "none"
}
```

### POST /api/analyze/compliance
Second-pass compliance re-check for flagged pages.
Required fields: url, content, firstScore
Optional fields: lang, model, modelApiBase, modelApiKey

Example:
```json
{
  "url": "https://example.com/page",
  "content": "Flagged page text...",
  "firstScore": 4
}
```

### POST /api/analyze/topic
Site topic & type detection.
Required fields: title, content
Optional fields: metaDescription, navText, lang, model, modelApiBase, modelApiKey

Example:
```json
{
  "title": "My Site",
  "metaDescription": "A site about...",
  "navText": "Home | About | Contact",
  "content": "Homepage text..."
}
```

### POST /api/analyze/approval
AdSense approval probability assessment.
Required fields: siteUrl, pageSummaries
Optional fields: siteType, siteTopic, pagesAnalyzed, totalDiscovered, compositeScore, pageValueScore, siteQuality, homeQuality, pageValueNote, lang, expert, model, modelApiBase, modelApiKey

Example:
```json
{
  "siteUrl": "https://example.com",
  "siteType": "content",
  "siteTopic": "Excel tools",
  "pagesAnalyzed": 10,
  "totalDiscovered": 50,
  "compositeScore": 65,
  "pageValueScore": 70,
  "siteQuality": 80,
  "homeQuality": 75,
  "pageSummaries": "- https://example.com/1: [pass] V=8 O=7 R=9 C=8\n- ..."
}
```

## Error Codes

- UNAUTHORIZED: Missing or invalid Authorization header
- FORBIDDEN: Invalid API key
- RATE_LIMITED: Too many requests
- BAD_REQUEST: Missing or invalid request fields
- AI_ERROR: Upstream AI API call failed
- NOT_FOUND: Path not found

## Project

https://github.com/cloudcreate-ai/adsense-checklist
